Triangle Builder Kit · Free & open source kit.isonew.digital

3 free AI skills for
Triangle nonprofits.

01
Prove your impact
impact-report-builder
Audit-ready impact reports
Raw metrics → a partner briefing mapped to GRI / SASB / SDOH. Every figure source-traced or flagged.
02
Find your funders
triangle-funder-intel
Regional funder intelligence
Scores your org against a regional funder list and researches new prospects — with sources. Never fabricated.
03
Reach every donor
bilingual-appeal-engine
Bilingual EN ⇄ ES appeals
Cultural transcreation for donor appeals, with a parity-QA pass. Not literal translation.
From raw data to board-ready — Apache-2.0, no strings. ZERO FABRICATION
